name: MemClaw
description: Layered semantic memory for OpenClaw with L0/L1/L2 tiered retrieval, easy setup, and migration from native memory

defaultSessionId.description: Default session ID for memory operations

minScore.description: Minimum relevance score for search results

autoStartServices.description: Automatically start Qdrant and cortex-mem-service if not running

qdrantPort.description: Qdrant port (default: 6333 for HTTP, 6334 for gRPC)

llmApiKey.description: LLM API key for memory extraction and summarization

llmModel.description: LLM model name for memory processing

embeddingApiKey.description: Embedding API key for vector generation

embeddingModel.description: Embedding model name for vector search

enhanceClawAgent.description: Automatically enhance MemClaw memory usage guide when legacy memory patterns are detected

serviceUrl.label: Service URL
serviceUrl.description: The HTTP endpoint of your cortex-mem-service instance

autoStartServices.label: Auto-start Services
autoStartServices.description: Automatically start Qdrant and cortex-mem-service when plugin loads

llmApiKey.label: LLM API Key
llmApiKey.description: API key for LLM service (required for memory processing)

llmModel.label: LLM Model
llmModel.description: Model name for memory extraction and summarization

embeddingApiKey.label: Embedding API Key
embeddingApiKey.description: API key for embedding service (required for vector search)

embeddingModel.label: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.description: Model name for generating vector embeddings

enhanceClawAgent.label: Enhance AGENTS
enhanceClawAgent.description: Automatically enhance MemClaw usage guide when legacy memory patterns are found
